disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chest tightness that came on with the physical exertion of sex and settled after about five minutes of rest
trigger_question_examples: Tell me exactly what you felt in your chest.
Did the chest tightness come on with effort, and did resting help?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: My chest went really tight and heavy while we were being intimate, and it eased off after I stopped and sat down for about five minutes.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Burning, cramping pain in both calves brought on by the exertion and relieved by stopping
trigger_question_examples: What did your legs feel like?
Do your calves ache or cramp when you walk or exert yourself?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Both my calves started burning and cramping during it, and the cramp eased once I stopped moving.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Progressive loss of firm erections over about a year with absent morning and spontaneous erections
trigger_question_examples: How long has the erection difficulty been going on?
Do you still get firm morning or night-time erections?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: It's got slowly worse over the past year, and I don't really get firm erections in the morning or at night any more, even on my own.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Known high blood pressure with antihypertensive medication stopped about three months ago
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any ongoing health conditions like blood pressure?
Are you taking any regular medications, and have you missed any?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've got high blood pressure and I was on tablets for it, but I stopped taking them about three months ago.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Became sweaty and clammy during the episode and felt very anxious and frightened
trigger_question_examples: Did you feel sweaty, sick or faint during it?
How were you feeling in yourself while it was happening?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I broke out in a sweat and felt clammy, and I was really frightened I was having a heart attack.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No chest pain at rest currently; the tightness has fully settled and has not returned
trigger_question_examples: Do you have any chest pain or tightness right now, at rest?
Has the tightness come back since it settled?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, my chest feels okay now that I'm sitting resting — it hasn't come back since it settled.
